name: googlecloudplatform-knowledge-catalog
description: Use this skill when interacting with the knowledge-catalog repository to ensure all modifications strictly adhere to the Open Knowledge Format (OKF) specification.

metadata.summary_title: A vendor-neutral, markdown-based knowledge representation system designed for universal interoperability.
summary_bullets: Prioritize the OKF specification (SPEC.md) as the single source of truth for all data structures.
Maintain strict separation between the OKF format definition and the agentic tools used to generate it.
Ensure all knowledge bundles are human-readable, plain markdown files with YAML frontmatter.
Use provided helper functions for path-to-concept mapping to maintain index integrity.
